label: Strike: Wounds
description: Each player gains wounds (often with a reveal gate)

label: Strike: Discard
description: Each player discards cards or discards down to N

label: Strike: KO Heroes
description: KO heroes from hand, discard, or HQ

label: Strike: Spawn
description: The Strike card itself enters the city as a villain

label: Strike: Deck Disruption
description: Cards placed on top of deck, deck manipulation

label: Strike: Escalate
description: Strikes stack — effects grow with each successive strike

label: Strike: Board Effect
description: Villains escape, move, or board state changes
